instruction.title: Technical Architecture Plan & Framework Guidelines
instruction.overview: This configuration document outlines the core architecture boundaries, framework selections, hydration paths, and asset preloading rules.

principles.rule: Server First: Default to React Server Components (RSC) to minimize client-side bundle size.
Isolate Interactivity: Wrap interactive targets in small Client Component (RCC) leaf boundaries.
Configuration Driven: Manage prices, currencies, animations, and metadata inside central config files.
Zero Sibling Imports: Sections cannot import elements from sibling components.
Zero-Runtime Animations: Use pure CSS variables and hardware-accelerated animations instead of JS engines.

adr.decision: Next.js App Router + React Server Components
adr.alternatives: Vanilla JS, Vite Single Page App
adr.rationale: Enables SSR/SSG for instant SEO crawling and LCP speeds, with partial hydration for interactive leaf elements.

adr.decision: Custom CSS Modules + Global CSS variables
adr.rationale: Ensures zero-runtime styling, clean HTML without utility bloat, and granular token integrations.

leaf.name: BentoCard
leaf.purpose: activeIndex border glow and details accordion

asset_handling.fonts: Load local font assets using next/font/local. Set font-display: swap to prevent blank text.
asset_handling.vectors: Convert SVGs into modular components. Avoid unified switch-case systems to enable bundler tree-shaking.

boundary.action: Displays segment skeletons to reduce perceived load time.
Catches runtime errors using React Error Boundaries without breaking the global layout.
Custom 404 page styled with global design system tokens.
